Òwe Yòòbá
Home About Contact

Disclaimer

Yoruba is a language of many dialects, and the interpretation of any proverb varies by region, generation, and context of use. The archive records these variants rather than adjudicating between them.

Entries are compiled with care. Errors and omissions are inevitable in a living corpus. Corrections are welcomed at hello@oweyoruba.org.

0 of 5000 proverbs archived
